options.command: cargo build --release --manifest-path apps/rhino-cli/Cargo.toml && mkdir -p apps/rhino-cli/dist && cp apps/rhino-cli/target/release/rhino-cli apps/rhino-cli/dist/rhino-cli

test:quick.comment: Library coverage gate at 90% lines. Ignored files are exercised only via integration tests / git- and external-tool-dependent paths: cli.rs + main.rs (entrypoint/dispatch), commands/*.rs (thin clap adapters covered by cucumber tests — testcoverage, speccoverage, docs, agents, git, contracts, java, env, doctor), internal/git/root.rs (filesystem walk-up + logical-path working-directory resolution), internal/git/runner.rs (pre-commit orchestrator whose steps shell out to docker/nx/npx/npm/git — only the error path is deterministically checkable; its branch logic is covered by injected-Deps unit tests), and testcoverage/{diff,merge}.rs (git-diff and on-disk-merge paths). The env/doctor engines (internal/envbackup/*, internal/doctor/*) carry the logic and are unit-tested directly. Actual measured lines coverage is ~92%.

options.command: echo 'Phase 0 — specs:coverage stubbed; cucumber-rs tests + validator land in Phase 1'

naming:harness-validation.command: cargo run --release -q --manifest-path apps/rhino-cli/Cargo.toml -- harness validate naming

naming:workflows-validation.command: cargo run --release -q --manifest-path apps/rhino-cli/Cargo.toml -- workflows validate naming

governance:vendor-audit-validation.command: cargo run --release -q --manifest-path apps/rhino-cli/Cargo.toml -- repo-governance validate vendor repo-governance/

specs:gherkin-cardinality-validation.command: cargo run --release -q --manifest-path apps/rhino-cli/Cargo.toml -- specs validate gherkin-cardinality

harness:bindings-validation.command: cargo run --release -q --manifest-path apps/rhino-cli/Cargo.toml -- harness validate bindings

mermaid:validation.command: cargo run --release -q --manifest-path apps/rhino-cli/Cargo.toml -- md validate mermaid --max-depth=4 --exclude plans/done --exclude apps/rhino-cli/tests/fixtures

links:validation.command: cargo run --release -q --manifest-path apps/rhino-cli/Cargo.toml -- md validate links --exclude plans/done --exclude apps/crud-be-elixir-phoenix/deps --exclude apps/crud-be-kotlin-ktor/build --exclude libs/elixir-cabbage/deps --exclude libs/elixir-gherkin/deps --exclude libs/elixir-openapi-codegen/deps

headings:hierarchy-validation.command: cargo run --release -q --manifest-path apps/rhino-cli/Cargo.toml -- md validate heading-hierarchy

dockerfiles:lint.comment: Dockerfile lint gate (lint-safety-parity D6). Fails on warning-and-above per .hadolint.yaml. Vendored Dockerfiles (deps/_build/.venv/target/archived/node_modules) excluded.

shell:lint.comment: Shell lint gate (lint-safety-parity D7). shellcheck --severity=warning over all *.sh scripts plus the extensionless husky hooks; config in .shellcheckrc.

actions:lint.comment: GitHub Actions lint gate (lint-safety-parity D8). actionlint auto-discovers .github/workflows/ and type-checks expressions, runner labels, and embedded run: shell scripts (via shellcheck).
